jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Licious
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Licious in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
